systems.name: Playable game loop
systems.notes: Movement, interaction, minigames, save/load, and region travel work in sample scope.

systems.name: Museum hub
systems.notes: Central hub with portals to all expedition regions.

systems.name: Expedition regions
systems.notes: Six playable regions with species placement — sample taxa only, not global coverage.

systems.name: Species encounters
systems.notes: Wildlife observation and fossil excavation minigames for region species.

systems.name: Artifact collection
systems.notes: Ethical artifact templates tied to hero species with notebook logging.

systems.name: Lifeling companion
systems.notes: Companion rendering, traits, emotes, and unlock progression.

systems.name: ArchiveDex
systems.notes: ArchiveDex is fully implemented as a species-entry system for the current snapshot. Full Catalogue of Life coverage depends on real COL ingestion. FULLY_IMPLEMENTED for current verified snapshot scope. Global completion requires source snapshot ingestion.

systems.name: Time Atlas
systems.notes: Time Atlas is fully implemented as a browsing and gate system for the current verified time snapshot. Live ICS refresh/import is handled through source ingestion workflow. FULLY_IMPLEMENTED for current verified snapshot scope. Global completion requires source snapshot ingestion.

systems.name: NASA Earth Layer Console
systems.notes: NASA adapters implemented with mode badges; run npm run source:import:nasa for real metadata cache.

systems.name: Global Coverage Matrix
systems.notes: Global Coverage Matrix is fully implemented as a coverage engine. Global completeness depends on real source snapshot ingestion. FULLY_IMPLEMENTED for current verified snapshot scope. Global completion requires source snapshot ingestion.

systems.name: Coverage Dashboard
systems.notes: Coverage Dashboard is fully implemented as a dev/admin dashboard for current snapshot coverage. FULLY_IMPLEMENTED for current verified snapshot scope. Global completion requires source snapshot ingestion.

systems.name: Implementation Status Dashboard
systems.notes: Dev/admin panel (?dev=1, key I) showing release readiness and incomplete inventory.

systems.name: Quests
systems.notes: Quest tracking and progress for sample expedition goals.

systems.name: Map
systems.notes: Region travel map for museum-connected biomes.

systems.name: Field notebook
systems.notes: Artifact log and expedition notes.

systems.name: Python data pipeline
systems.notes: Python pipeline is fully implemented as the local data pipeline runner. Source-specific ingestion adapters require configured snapshots or credentials. FULLY_IMPLEMENTED for current verified snapshot scope. Global completion requires source snapshot ingestion.

systems.name: SQL pipeline
systems.notes: SQL pipeline is fully implemented for current snapshot validation and gap reporting. FULLY_IMPLEMENTED for current verified snapshot scope. Global completion requires source snapshot ingestion.

systems.name: Source snapshot workflow
systems.blockedReason: Full COL/GBIF/IUCN/PBDB downloads not imported; sample snapshots only.
systems.notes: Source snapshot import workflow is executable via npm run source:* commands.

systems.name: Catalogue of Life full ingestion
systems.blockedReason: Catalogue of Life snapshot not found. Download approved snapshot and set COL_SNAPSHOT_PATH in data-pipeline/.env.
systems.notes: Import command available: npm run source:import:col

systems.name: Bundle generation
systems.notes: generate:bundles and generate:time-atlas produce committed sample bundles.

systems.name: Source provenance
systems.notes: Provenance model distinguishes game_authored_verified, source_verified, mock_sample, derived_inferred, and blocked_external.

systems.name: CI workflow
systems.notes: GitHub Actions runs typecheck, audits, build, and Python pipeline.

systems.name: Data and coverage audits
systems.notes: TypeScript and Python audits with mock/verified count separation.

systems.name: Documentation
systems.notes: Architecture, coverage, provenance, and release policies documented.

systems.name: Issue templates
systems.notes: GitHub issue templates for data, coverage, and bugs.

systems.name: PR template
systems.notes: Pull request checklist for data and audit changes.

systems.name: Release snapshot policy
systems.notes: Release gates and snapshot manifest policy defined.

systems.name: NASA Earthdata live ingestion
systems.blockedReason: No real NASA metadata cache yet. Run npm run source:import:nasa.
systems.notes: Public API adapters implemented; import populates data-pipeline/exports/nasa/.

systems.name: Neotoma paleoecology ingestion
systems.blockedReason: Neotoma snapshot not configured. Set NEOTOMA_SNAPSHOT_PATH or NEOTOMA_API_ENABLED.
systems.notes: Import command available: npm run source:import:neotoma
